projects.title: Disease Diagnosis using Machine Learning
projects.description: Disease Diagnosis using Machine Learning Built a machine learning model using Python and Scikit-learn to predict diabetes using the PIMA Indian Diabetes Dataset. Performed data preprocessing and feature selection and implemented a Random Forest classifier, achieving ~74% prediction accuracy. Designed an optimized campus transportation routing system using graph-based modeling and the Greedy Nearest Neighbor algorithm. Improved route planning efficiency while considering bus capacity and scheduling constraints.

projects.title: Social Event Management Web Application
projects.description: Social Event Management Web Application Developed a web-based platform connecting customers with event service providers. Implemented service search, booking, rating, and location-based recommendations with a database to manage users, services, bookings, and feedback.
